title: Beyond efficiency: PayPal expands what's possible to build with AI
summary: PayPal used Cursor to complete a 3,000-app Java upgrade 6x faster with high-adoption teams deploying daily. PayPal projects 40% more capabilities delivery in 2026 through expanded AI development tooling.
